title: Weekly Contest Reminder
message: Codeforces Round is scheduled for this Saturday 8:00 PM IST. Participation is optional but strongly recommended for Units 1-2 practice.

title: Assignment 5 Released
message: Assignment 5 on Number Theory is now live on the Assignments page. Due April 7, 2026.

title: Mid Exam Schedule Posted
message: Mid Semester Exam for 23CS4121 is scheduled. Check the Previous Papers page for the syllabus split and sample papers.

title: Quiz Tomorrow: Unit 2
message: A short quiz covering Bit Manipulation and Tries will be held at the start of tomorrow's lab session.

title: Lab Slot Swap Window Open
message: Students who need to swap their programming lab slot can submit requests through the department portal until Friday.
